svg.title: Video streaming app system design
svg.desc: Architecture showing Frontend, API, NeonDB in top row; Backblaze B2, Message Queue, GitHub Actions FFMPEG worker in bottom row; with storage card on left showing 360p/480p/720p segments.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the Frontend do in this video streaming app?')
sendPrompt('What does the API layer do in this video streaming architecture?')
sendPrompt('What data does NeonDB store in this video streaming system?')
sendPrompt('How are the HLS video segments organised in storage?')
sendPrompt('Why use Backblaze B2 for storing HLS segments?')
sendPrompt('What message queue is used and how does it trigger transcoding?')
sendPrompt('How does GitHub Actions run the FFMPEG mp4 to HLS transcoding?')
